description: Style Note Tonga's summer collection features head-turning designs - fashion-forward yet classic, this piece will stay in vogue up to the next season. Tap into summer's aesthetic effortlessly while chanelling the runway's hottest trends. Style this with a tapering pair of denims (we recommend a wedge heel for the spring) for maximum effect.Product Details Cream-coloured sleeveless top with pink dotting, has a mock collar with ruffles and tie-up detail and spread collar-like flaps at the neck and elastication on the hemMaterial and Care Blended satiny fabricHand wash coldDo not bleachHang or line drySize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
